name: Migraine with aura

patient.free_text: Recurrent headaches for years, worse during menstruation. Today's episode started with zigzag visual lines lasting 20 minutes, then a pounding right-sided headache. Lying in a dark room helps.

source: IHS Classification of Headache Disorders (ICHD-3) criteria for migraine with aura
notes: Visual aura followed by unilateral throbbing headache + photophobia/phonophobia = textbook migraine with aura.
